title: Lunge On A Mace?
description: Lunge on a Mace? this plugin make the mace have a super power
body:
**Dash Mace**

Instantly close the distance on your foes or escape danger! The Dash Mace is a simple, yet powerful utility that grants the player a burst of mobility on command, adding a dynamic layer to combat.

✨ Key Features

    ⚡ Tactical Dash Ability: Right-click with the Mace to instantly propel the player forward. Use it to dodge attacks, close the gap on fleeing enemies, or quickly traverse small distances.

    ⏳ Configurable Cooldown: Balanced for server play! The dash ability has a configurable cooldown to prevent constant spamming and keep combat fair.

    ✅ Single Item Focus: Built specifically to augment the new vanilla Mace weapon, keeping the plugin lightweight and focused.

⚙️ Configuration (config.yml)

- 
- ```
- The plugin generates a simple config.yml file, allowing you to fine-tune the ability for your server's needs.
- Setting	Default	Description
- dash-cooldown-seconds	10	
- The cooldown time (in seconds) after a player uses the dash.
- dash-power	6.0	The force multiplier applied to the dash (controls distance).
- dash-message-cooldown	true
- Toggles whether the player receives a chat message when the ability is on cooldown.
- ```
